title: digitaria sanguinalis var. multinervis
intro: Digitaria sanguinalis var. multinervis, also known as small crabgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Digitaria sanguinalis var. multinervis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or infused into oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
